channel.title: 2012 on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in 2012 on Have an average day :|

item.title: Pop Danthology 2012 - Mashup of 50+ Pop Songs
item.description: I saw a post Reddit about this. OP says it took 500 hours to put together. You can really see that effort put into this video. It’s truly an example of 2012 pop music. I’m not a fan my self but I’m wowed by this. I hope you are too.

A new year is coming! Only two years shy of 2012. The only thing I’m worried about are the people who believe in 2012 so strongly they turn it into a self-fulfilling prophecy. Now is when I would be worried about that happening because two years is enough time to gather supplies and plan for the end game. I wonder how many people think the world is really going to end.
